screensaver.name: flipclock
screensaver._description: Minimalist flip clock screensaver with dark theme and flip animation

string._label: A minimal flip clock widget with 24h format, flip card animation, and dark mode.

screensaver._description:
FlipClock displays a beautiful flip clock with large hour and minute cards in 24-hour format. Features smooth flip animation and a minimal dark theme.
Written by nandomoreira.
